title: WeHaveOneLife
description:
WeHaveOneLife — a shared-health plugin.

Damage taken by one player is distributed to everyone. The death of one means the death of the entire group. A minimalist hardcore experience for Minecraft Servers.
body:
**WeHaveOneLife — a minimalist shared-health hardcore plugin for Minecraft.** 
One dies, all die.

All players feel the damage: if one gets hit, everyone suffers.
The death of one leads to the downfall of all.
Atmospheric notifications are displayed in the ActionBar.
The plugin is designed for playing with friends, where the main value is team unity and maximum risk.

_The plugin is lightweight and easily compatible with any other server modifications and builds._
